description: In the image, a man is seated at a desk in a room that is dimly lit by a single lamp. He is wearing a yellow shirt and is engaged with a laptop computer that is placed on the desk in front of him. The room features two windows, each adorned with curtains of different colors - one window has red curtains while the other has white curtains. The overall atmosphere of the room suggests it might be evening or night due to the darkness outside.
